description: This file contains SCSS styles for alert components, including base styles, heading styles, link styles, dismissible alert styles, and contextual modifier classes for different alert states.
external_files: variables or mixins files (implied by use of variables and @include)

possibly other SCSS partials that define $prefix, $alert-padding-x, $alert-padding-y, $alert-margin-bottom, $alert-border-width, $alert-border-radius, $alert-link-font-weight, $stretched-link-z-index, and $theme-colors
